errors.amount_positive: The amount must be greater than 0
errors.amount_positive_or_avoir: The money amount must be greater than 0 unless the payment is settled by credit note
errors.avoir_money_zero_required: A credit-note settlement must have a zero money amount
errors.avoir_required: A credit-note settlement requires at least one credit note usage
errors.fee_non_negative: The fee must be greater than or equal to 0
errors.fee_less_than_amount: The fee must be lower than the amount
errors.convertion_rate_positive: The exchange rate must be greater than 0
errors.invoice_allocation_required: Please assign at least one invoice with an amount greater than 0
errors.invoice_allocation_total_mismatch: The total amount must equal the sum of the allocated invoice amounts
errors.reference_required: Reference is required for checks and drafts
errors.due_date_required: Due date is required for checks and drafts
errors.treasury_account_required: Treasury account is required when there is a money movement
errors.credit_note_amount_positive: The used credit note amount must be greater than 0
errors.credit_note_converted_amount_positive: The converted credit note amount must be greater than 0
errors.credit_note_exchange_rate_required: The credit note exchange rate is required when currencies differ
errors.avoir_not_allowed_with_instrument: Credit notes cannot be used with checks or drafts
errors.due_date_after_date: Due date must be on or after the payment date

withholding_tax.export_tej_planned: TEJ export will be available when an official endpoint is added.
withholding_tax.delete_confirm_description:
This action will remove the withholding tax from this payment. The withheld amount will no longer count toward invoice coverage, and the linked invoice may become partially paid again.

The payment, invoice, and treasury movements will not be deleted.
